name: Graffiti Tokens
official_rules_text: A Graﬃti token (Advantage) represents a striking image or symbol painted onto the terrain of the battle/f_ield. Graﬃti tokens affect a unit’s morale. Players should place the Graﬃti token flat on a surface. During a unit's Rally step, it may roll 1 additional die if it has LOS to and is within 2 of an allied Graﬃti token. If it has LOS and is within 2 of an enemy Graﬃti token, it must roll 1 fewer die, to a minimum of 1. Graﬃti tokens remain in play until the end of the game. Units may Move through and end a movement overlapping Graﬃti tokens.
